typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT *,CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY phn_clean, row_id)/300000 as smallint) AS batch_nbr FROM  ( SELECT DISTINCT   [row_id]   ,[row_score]   ,[fz_input_key]   ,[fz_output_match_key]   ,[hosp_patient_nbr]   ,[phn]   ,[phn_clean]   ,[name_first]   ,[name_first_middle_clean]   ,[name_last_clean]   ,[first_name_score]   ,[last_name_score]   ,[birth_date]   ,[gender]   ,[aka_name]   ,[street_addr1]   ,[street_addr2]   ,[city]   ,[province]   ,[postal_code]   ,[phone_number]   ,[data_source]   ,[dupe_count]   ,[julian_month]   ,[patient_nbr] FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_fz_output]) FO',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcfzoutput
srcfzoutput sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		fz_output_match_key as integer,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		batch_nbr as integer,
		phn_clean as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		fz_input_key as integer,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		fz_output_match_key,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		batch_nbr,
		phn_clean,
		patient_nbr,
		name_last_clean,
		name_first,
		first_name_score,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		fz_input_key,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		row_id,
		postal_code)) ~> destfzoutput2
